fields.title: Foliage
fields.description: Sets the color foliage will be tinted by in this biome on the map.

fields.title: Grass
fields.description: Controls whether the grass will use a custom tint color or a noise based tint color.

description: Sets the color grass and foliage will be tinted by in this biome on the map.
title: Minecraft Map Tints Misc
